content:
--- a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
+++ b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
@@ -1,72 +1,210 @@
-/**
- * Professional pixel-art character & room renderer for KingdomOS.
- * Inspired by SkyOffice (Phaser/LimeZu) and Pixel Agents (Canvas 2D/sprite manifests).
- *
- * Key improvements over v1:
- * - Proper outlined pixel characters with shading and detail
- * - Multi-frame idle/walk animations per character type
- * - Tilemap-quality room rendering with proper tiles and furniture
- * - Character movement within rooms
- * - Speech bubbles showing agent activity
- * - Lighting effects with torch glow
- * - Particle system for ambient effects
- */
-
-export type CharacterType = 'king' | 'nobility' | 'knight' | 'squire' | 'healer' | 'sentinel' | 'scribe' | 'judge' | 'blacksmith';
-export type AnimState = 'idle' | 'working' | 'reviewing' | 'stalled' | 'cancelled';
-
-// ─── Color Palette (medieval shading ramps) ────────────────────────
-const P = {
-  stone: ['#1e1e2a', '#2d2d3d', '#3f3f52', '#555568', '#6e6e82'],
-  wood: ['#1a0e06', '#2e1a0a', '#3e2a18', '#5c3317', '#7a5030'],
-  gold: ['#806020', '#b08830', '#d4a840', '#f0c040', '#fff080'],
-  crimson: ['#3a0a0a', '#6b1010', '#8b2020', '#c03030', '#e04040'],
-  royal: ['#0a0a3a', '#1a1a5a', '#2a2a8a', '#3a50b0', '#5080d0'],
-  forest: ['#0a1a0a', '#102a10', '#1a4a1a', '#2a7a2a', '#40b040'],
-  skin: ['#8a6040', '#b08060', '#d0a080', '#e8c0a0', '#f0d4b8'],
-  dark: ['#0a0a0e', '#14141e', '#1e1e2e', '#282838', '#323248'],
-};
-
-function shadeColor(hex: string, percent: number): string {
-  const num = parseInt(hex.replace('#', ''), 16);
-  const r = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, ((num >> 16) & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
-  const g = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, ((num >> 8) & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
-  const b = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, (num & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
-  return `#${(r << 16 | g << 8 | b).toString(16).padStart(6, '0')}`;
-}
-
-// ─── Character palette builder ─────────────────────────────────────
-
-function charPalette(skin: string, hair: string, pri: string, sec: string, acc: string, cape?: string): Record<string, string> {
-  return {
-    O: '#1a1018',
-    S: skin, s: shadeColor(skin, -30),
-    H: hair, h: shadeColor(hair, -25),
-    P: pri, p: shadeColor(pri, -25),
-    C: sec, c: shadeColor(sec, -25),
-    A: acc, a: shadeColor(acc, -25),
-    K: cape ?? pri, k: shadeColor(cape ?? pri, -30),
-    W: '#ffffff', w: '#c8c8c8',
-    E: '#1a1020',
-    B: '#3e2a18', b: '#2e1a0a',
-    G: P.gold[3], g: P.gold[2],
-    M: '#7f8c8d', m: '#5a6570',
-    R: '#e74c3c', L: '#3498db', F: '#2ecc71',
-    T: '#f5e6ca', t: '#d4c5a9',
-  };
-}
-
-// ─── Sprite definitions (16 wide × ~22 tall) ──────────────────────
-

+/**
+ * Professional pixel-art character & room renderer for KingdomOS.
+ * Inspired by SkyOffice (Phaser/LimeZu) and Pixel Agents (Canvas 2D/sprite manifests).
+ *
+ * Redesigned character sprites with proper 16x24 pixel proportions.
+ * Each sprite has distinct head, body, and legs sections.
+ */
+
+export type CharacterType = 'king' | 'nobility' | 'knight' | 'squire' | 'healer' | 'sentinel' | 'scribe' | 'judge' | 'blacksmith';
+export type AnimState = 'idle' | 'working' | 'reviewing' | 'stalled' | 'cancelled';
+
+// ─── Color Palette (medieval shading ramps) ────────────────────────
+const P = {
+  stone: ['#1e1e2a', '#2d2d3d', '#3f3f52', '#555568', '#6e6e82'],
+  wood: ['#1a0e06', '#2e1a0a', '#3e2a18', '#5c3317', '#7a5030'],
+  gold: ['#806020', '#b08830', '#d4a840', '#f0c040', '#fff080'],
+  crimson: ['#3a0a0a', '#6b1010', '#8b2020', '#c03030', '#e04040'],
+  royal: ['#0a0a3a', '#1a1a5a', '#2a2a8a', '#3a50b0', '#5080d0'],
+  forest: ['#0a1a0a', '#102a10', '#1a4a1a', '#2a7a2a', '#40b040'],
+  skin: ['#8a6040', '#b08060', '#d0a080', '#e8c0a0', '#f0d4b8'],
+  dark: ['#0a0a0e', '#14141e', '#1e1e2e', '#282838', '#323248'],
+};
+
+function shadeColor(hex: string, percent: number): string {
+  const num = parseInt(hex.replace('#', ''), 16);
+  const r = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, ((num >> 16) & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
+  const g = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, ((num >> 8) & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
+  const b = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, (num & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
+  return `#${(r << 16 | g << 8 | b).toString(16).padStart(6, '0')}`;
+}
+
+// ─── Character palette builder ─────────────────────────────────────
+
+function charPalette(skin: string, hair: string, pri: string, sec: string, acc: string, cape?: string): Record<string, string> {
+  return {
+    O: '#1a1018',
+    S: skin, s: shadeColor(skin, -30),
+    H: hair, h: shadeColor(hair, -25),
+    P: pri, p: shadeColor(pri, -25),
+    C: sec, c: shadeColor(sec, -25),
+    A: acc, a: shadeColor(acc, -25),
+    K: cape ?? pri, k: shadeColor(cape ?? pri, -30),
+    W: '#ffffff', w: '#c8c8c8',
+    E: '#1a1020',
+    B: '#3e2a18', b: '#2e1a0a',
+    G: P.gold[3], g: P.gold[2],
+    M: '#7f8c8d', m: '#5a6570',
+    R: '#e74c3c', L: '#3498db', F: '#2ecc71',
+    T: '#f5e6ca', t: '#d4c5a9',
+  };
+}
+
+// ─── Redesigned 16x24 character sprites ───────────────────────────
+
+const KING_SPRITE = [
+  '      OOOO      ',
+  '     OHHHHO     ',
+  '    OHSSSSHO    ',
+  '    OHSSSSHO    ',

+];

+  '    OHSESSHO    ',
+  '   OHSSSSSHO    ',
+  '   OPPPPPPPO    ',
+  '   OPPCCCPPO    ',
+  '   OPPCCCPPO    ',
+  '   OPPPPPPPO    ',
+  '    OPPPPPO     ',
+  '    OPPPPPO     ',
+  '    OPPPPPO     ',
+  '    OBBBBBO     ',

+];
+
+const SCRIBE_SPRITE = [
+  '      OOOO      ',
+  '     OHHHHO     ',
+  '    OHSSSSHO    ',
+  '    OHSESSHO    ',
+  '   OHSSSSSHO    ',
+  '   OPPPPPPPO    ',
+  '   OPPTTTPPO    ',
+  '   OPPTTTPPO    ',
+  '   OPPPPPPPO    ',
+  '    OPPPPPO     ',
+  '    OPPPPPO     ',
+  '    OPPPPPO     ',
+  '    OBBBBBO     ',

+];

+const JUDGE_SPRITE = [

+const BLACKSMITH_SPRITE = [
+  '      OOOO      ',

+];
+
+const SPRITE_MAP: Record<CharacterType, string[]> = {
+  king: KING_SPRITE,
+  knight: KNIGHT_SPRITE,
+  healer: HEALER_SPRITE,
+  sentinel: SENTINEL_SPRITE,
+  nobility: NOBILITY_SPRITE,
+  squire: SQUIRE_SPRITE,
+  scribe: SCRIBE_SPRITE,
+  judge: JUDGE_SPRITE,
+  blacksmith: BLACKSMITH_SPRITE,
+};
+
